name: QuanAyraTalk
commands: Princess Ayra of Isaach, I presume?{br}I heard your story from Sigurd.{w}{br}I'm Quan of Lenster{w}

I'd hate to press you for information so soon,{br}but there's something I'd like to know.{w}{br}Why did Isaach attack Darna in the first place?{w}{br}Surely you knew doing so would invoke the wrath of Grannvale.{w}{br}That King Mananan would commit such a{br}reckless act... The very idea defies belief.{w}
You knew my father, Sir Quan!?{w}

I'm afraid I never had the chance to meet him.{br}However, my father knows him well.{w}{br}He's always had only the utmost praise for him.{w}{br}He also speaks fondly of your brother,{br}Prince Mariccle.{w}{br}He's always said he's a fine young man{w}

Is that so? It heartens me to hear it.{w}{br}Without any doubt, my father and Mariccle were{br}admirable men. Never would they condone{w}{br}such an assault on a defenseless city.{w}{br}In the matter of Darna, the patriarch of Rivough{br}acted alone and without our consent...{w}
I beg your pardon!?{br}Why haven't the Grannvalians heard this?{w}{br}Surely if Prince Kurth knew the truth,{br}he would refuse to continue the war.{w}
So, too, thought my father.{w}{br}Once he executed the Rivough patriarch,{w}{br}he departed for the Grannvale front, head in tow,{br} to negotiate with them.{w}{br}But...{w}

My father, the king...{br}He was assassinated on the way.{w}{br}Once word of this returned to Isaach,{br}the people were utterly incensed.{w}{br}Mariccle set out, leading our entire army,{br}seeking vengeance against Grannvale.{w}
Something is amiss here.{br}The murder of a king who seeks peace talks,{br}certainly isn't like Prince Kurth, either.{w}{br}Have you told Sigurd of this as well?{w}
No. Lord Sigurd carries enough of a burden{br}as it is. It's too late for my brother...{w}
Prince Mariccle was resigned to his death{br}when he engaged Grannvale, wasn't he...?{w}
My brother believed to the last that Isaach's hope{br}for the future rests in Shannan, his son.{w}{br}My role is to protect Shannan, and with him, the promise of Isaach's liberty...{w}
I see. Thank you for telling me, Princess Ayra.{w}{br}Someday, the world will know this truth,{br}and till that day comes, you mustn't give in.{w}{br}I will do all I can to help you.{w}
